---
title: "Thoughs & Endeavours"
listing:
  id: mini-blog
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  # categories: cloud
  categories: unnumbered
---

A mix of hobby projects, hackathons, and (more or less technical) resources plus a few thoughts along the way. Some might say it's a mini blog.

::: {#mini-blog}
:::
